moments.title: World Cup Quarter-Finals: Spain vs Belgium LIVE
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarter-Finals are underway, with Spain facing Belgium tonight for a place in the semi-finals.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: Huge night in the World Cup Quarter-Finals! Spain take on Belgium for a spot in the semis. Who are you backing? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Live Commentary Hook
angles.copy: It's kick-off! Spain vs Belgium is LIVE in the World Cup Quarter-Finals. Can Spain's flair overcome Belgium's power? Tune in!

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean make chart history
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's duet 'Rein Me In' has become the longest-running UK Number 1 single by a British act ever, with 16 non-consecutive weeks at the top.

angles.name: Record Breakers
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is officially the longest-running British No.1 single of all time. 16 weeks at the top! Incredible.

angles.name: Compare to Wet Wet Wet
angles.copy: Remember Wet Wet Wet's 'Love Is All Around' spending 15 weeks at No.1? Sam Fender & Olivia Dean have just beaten that record!

moments.title: Ann Widdecombe murder investigation in Devon
moments.blurb: A murder investigation has been launched after former MP Ann Widdecombe, 78, was found dead at her Dartmoor home, with a 26-year-old man arrested in Newton Abbot.

angles.name: Local News Update
angles.copy: Major incident in Devon: A murder investigation is underway following the death of former MP Ann Widdecombe, 78, at her Dartmoor home. A 26-year-old man has been arrested.

angles.name: National Impact
angles.copy: Shocking news from Devon. Former MP Ann Widdecombe has died, with police launching a murder investigation and making an arrest. Our thoughts are with her family.

moments.title: Swansea murder investigation after fatal collision
moments.blurb: South Wales Police have made further arrests in connection with a murder investigation following a fatal collision involving a car and an off-road bike in Gorseinon, Swansea, yesterday.

source.l: South Wales Police / Welsh News Extra

angles.name: Local Crime Update
angles.copy: Gorseinon update: Further arrests made in the ongoing murder investigation after yesterday's fatal collision in Swansea. Our thoughts are with those affected.

angles.name: Community Impact
angles.copy: Traumatic time for Gorseinon. Police are continuing their investigation into the fatal collision, with several arrests now made. Stay safe, Swansea.

moments.title: Paul Weller plays Newcastle tonight
moments.blurb: The Modfather, Paul Weller, is performing live in Newcastle tonight as part of his 2026 summer shows.

angles.name: Gig Tonight
angles.copy: Newcastle, are you ready for The Modfather? Paul Weller is LIVE tonight! What's your favourite Weller track to hear him play?

angles.name: Weller Vibes
angles.copy: Paul Weller still rocking stages! If you're seeing him in Newcastle tonight, get ready for a legendary set. What's the ultimate Weller anthem?

moments.title: Happy 46th Birthday Jessica Simpson
moments.blurb: American pop singer, actress, and reality TV star Jessica Simpson turns 46 today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 46th Birthday to the one and only Jessica Simpson! What's your favourite hit from the pop princess?

angles.name: Iconic Moments
angles.copy: From 'I Wanna Love You Forever' to 'Dukes of Hazzard', Jessica Simpson turns 46 today! Celebrate with us by playing her biggest hits.

moments.title: Happy 72nd Birthday Neil Tennant
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, one half of the iconic synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, celebrates his 72nd birthday today.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Legend
angles.copy: It's Neil Tennant's 72nd Birthday! Celebrate the Pet Shop Boys legend with us – what's your ultimate PSB anthem? #PetShopBoys

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday to the inimitable Neil Tennant! From 'West End Girls' to 'Go West', his influence is undeniable.

moments.title: Wales heatwave continues
moments.blurb: A heatwave is expected to continue across Wales this week and next, with temperatures potentially reaching the low 30s Celsius.

angles.name: Stay Hydrated
angles.copy: Another week of hot weather for Wales! Temperatures in the low 30s expected. Stay cool and hydrated everyone!

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Sun's out, thermometers climbing! Enjoying the Welsh heatwave this weekend? Let us know what you're up to!

moments.title: New ITV thriller 'The Dark' premieres Sunday
moments.blurb: ITV's new gripping serial killer drama 'The Dark', set in the Scottish countryside, premieres this Sunday, July 12, at 9 pm.

angles.name: Sunday Night TV
angles.copy: Your Sunday night TV just got darker. New serial killer drama 'The Dark' premieres on ITV this Sunday at 9 pm! Set your reminders.

angles.name: Scottish Drama
angles.copy: Get ready for some Scottish suspense! New thriller 'The Dark' hits ITV this Sunday. Who's tuning in for the mystery?

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival returns to Alexandra Palace
moments.blurb: Kaleidoscope Festival takes over Alexandra Palace Park in London tomorrow, Saturday July 11, with a lineup of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: London Festival
angles.copy: Alexandra Palace is buzzing! Kaleidoscope Festival is back tomorrow, July 11th. Who's heading to London for the music and good vibes?

angles.name: Festival Lineup
angles.copy: Get ready for Kaleidoscope! The festival returns to Alexandra Palace tomorrow. Expect a brilliant mix of music, comedy and more!

moments.title: Happy 86th Birthday Giorgio Moroder
moments.blurb: The legendary 'Father of Disco' and electronic music pioneer Giorgio Moroder celebrates his 86th birthday tomorrow, July 11.

angles.name: Disco Pioneer
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the 86th Birthday of a true music icon: Giorgio Moroder! His influence on dance music is immeasurable. What's your favourite Moroder production?

angles.name: Sound of the 70s
angles.copy: Happy early Birthday to the incredible Giorgio Moroder, who turns 86 tomorrow! The genius behind Donna Summer's biggest hits.

moments.title: System Of A Down in London
moments.blurb: Nu-metal giants System Of A Down return to London for two massive shows on July 13 and 15, their first UK appearance in years.

angles.name: Rock Giants Return
angles.copy: System Of A Down are back! Catch them in London on July 13 & 15. Who's ready to mosh? #SOAD

angles.name: London Gigs
angles.copy: Heavy metal legends System Of A Down play London this week! Two huge shows on Monday and Wednesday. Get your tickets if you can!

moments.title: World Cup Semi-Finals kick off next week
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-finals are set to take place next week, on Tuesday, July 14, and Wednesday, July 15.

angles.name: Semi-Final Anticipation
angles.copy: The World Cup 2026 Semi-Finals are just days away! Who do you think will battle it out for a spot in the final? #WorldCupSemiFinals

angles.name: Path to the Final
angles.copy: It's getting serious! The World Cup Semi-Finals are scheduled for July 14th and 15th. Which teams are you hoping to see go all the way?

moments.title: Happy 39th Birthday Dan Reynolds
moments.blurb: Imagine Dragons frontman Dan Reynolds celebrates his 39th birthday on Sunday, July 14.

angles.name: Imagine Dragons Frontman
angles.copy: Get ready to shout 'Radioactive'! Wishing a very Happy 39th Birthday to Imagine Dragons' incredible frontman, Dan Reynolds, this Sunday!

angles.name: Birthday Rock
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the voice of Imagine Dragons, Dan Reynolds, turning 39 this Sunday! What's your favourite power anthem from the band?

moments.title: Jazz on the Quay returns to Exeter
moments.blurb: Free live jazz returns to Exeter Quayside this Sunday, July 12, with a performance by La Vie en Rose from 12:30 pm to 3:30 pm.

angles.name: Sunday Jazz
angles.copy: Relax by the water this Sunday! Jazz on the Quay is back in Exeter with La Vie en Rose performing free live jazz from 12:30 pm. Perfect Sunday vibes!

angles.name: Free Music Exeter
angles.copy: Looking for plans this Sunday? Head to Exeter Quayside for free live jazz with La Vie en Rose! Enjoy the music and the atmosphere.
